phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh ehn-TRAH-dahs

likely_response.local: Buenos días, al fondo a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the back on the left.

responses.english: Good morning, at the back on the left.
responses.phonetic: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Buenos días, al fondo a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided tours are available now
phrases.text_local: ¿Hay visitas guiadas disponibles en este momento?
phrases.pronunciation: AH-ee bee-SEE-tahs gee-AH-dahs dees-poh-NEE-bles ehn EHS-teh moh-MEHN-toh?

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is indicated at the entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, it is indicated at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Holy Grail chapel is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde se encuentra la capilla del Santo Cáliz?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿DOHN-deh seh en-kwen-TRAH lah kah-PEE-yah del SAHN-toh KAH-leeth?

likely_response.local: Al fondo de la girola, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEH LAH hee-ROH-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Inside, follow signs towards the Holy Grail.

responses.english: Inside, follow signs towards the Holy Grail.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEH LAH hee-ROH-lah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Al fondo de la girola, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the entrance
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la entrada principal?
phrases.pronunciation: dee-SKOOL-peh pohd-RÍ-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL

likely_response.local: Por la Puerta de los Hierros, enfrente.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH LOHS ee-EHR-rohs ehnf-REHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Through the Puerta de los Hierros, straight ahead.

responses.english: Through the Puerta de los Hierros, straight ahead.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH LOHS ee-EHR-rohs ehnf-REHN-teh
responses.french: Por la Puerta de los Hierros, enfrente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the dress code requires
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué ropa es necesaria para entrar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, keh ROH-pah es neh-seh-SAH-ree-ah PAH-rah en-TRAHR?

likely_response.local: Hombros y rodillas cubiertos, sin gorras dentro.
likely_response.pronunciation: OHMB-rohs Y roh-DEEL-lahs koo-bee-EHR-tohs SEEN GOHR-rahs DEHNT-roh
likely_response.translation_en: Shoulders and knees covered, no hats inside.

responses.english: Shoulders and knees covered, no hats inside.
responses.phonetic: OHMB-rohs Y roh-DEEL-lahs koo-bee-EHR-tohs SEEN GOHR-rahs DEHNT-roh
responses.french: Hombros y rodillas cubiertos, sin gorras dentro.
